nasb.text: Furthermore, you shall not intermarry with them; you shall not give your daughters to their sons, nor shall you take their daughters for your sons.

esv.text: You shall not intermarry with them, giving your daughters to their sons or taking their daughters for your sons,

cnv.text: 不可與他們通婚，不可把你的女兒嫁給他們的兒子，也不可為你的兒子娶他們的女兒。

ccb.text: 不可与他们通婚，不可让你们的儿女与他们的儿女通婚，
